A2059/26 NOTAMN Q) VVHM/QAFXX/IV/NBO/E/000/999/1053N11031E036 A) VVHM  PART 1 OF 2  B) 2607021200  C) 2607051530  D) DAILY 1200-1530  E) DUE TO AEROSPACE FLIGHT ACTIVITY FM CHINA, THE FLIGHT 
SAFETY OF THE ACFT IN THE FLW AREA MAY BE AFFECTED:
102200N1101300E-112600N1101600E-112500N1104900E-
102000N1104600E, POINTS CONNECTION RANGE
VERTICAL ALTITUDE: SFC-UNL
1. DRG THIS ACTIVITY, ATS RTE SEGMENTS MENTIONED BELOW 
ARE NOT USED:
- N500: DAMVO - MIMUX - AGSAM 
- M765: SAMAP - MAPNO - ALDAS
- N892: MIMUX - MAPNO - OSIXA
 2. DRG THIS ACTIVITY, ATS RTE SEGMENTS MENTIONED BELOW 
SHALL BE OPERATED AS FLW:
- ACFT ON M771:  ACFT SUBJ TO ATC CLEARANCES, DO NOT 
DEVIATE TO THE RIGHT OF ATS RTE
- ACFT ON M765, M765 - L625: M765 - DAGAG - UDOSI - ALDAS 
AND VICE VERSA
- ACFT ON N500: PANDI - AGSAM - 115400N1110600E - 
115400N1100300E - PTH - N500 AND VICE VERSA
- ACFT DEP/ARR VVTS VIA N500: 
+ PANDI - AGSAM - 115400N1110600E - 115400N1100300E - 
PTH - VVTS AND VICE VERSA, OR  
+ PANDI - AGSAM - UDOSI - DAGAG - M768 - ELSAS - VVTS 
AND VICE VERSA
- ACFT ARR VVTS VIA N892 - N500: CHANGED TO N892 - 
MESOX - Q15 - W15 - VVTS
- ACFT ON N892: N892 - MUGAN - UDOSI - MOXON - N892
- FL310, FL350, FL390 WILL BE APPLIED TO ACFT ON ATS RTE L625
- FL320, FL360, FL400 WILL BE APPLIED TO ACFT ON ATS RTE N892
REMARKS: END PART 1 OF 2
A2059/26 NOTAMN Q) VVHM/QAFXX/IV/NBO/E/000/999/1053N11031E036 A) VVHM  PART 2 OF 2  B) 2607021200  C) 2607051530  D) DAILY 1200-1530  E) - ALL ACFT SHALL AVOID THE AFFECTED AREA OR SUBJ TO ATC 
CLEARANCES
- THE AEROSPACE FLIGHT ACTIVITY CONDUCTED BY CHINA DIRECTLY 
AFFECTS FLIGHT OPERATIONS WI HO CHI MINH FIR. THE CHINA 
PARTY IS REQUIRED TO CONTINUE TO COORDINATE WITH THE 
COMPETENT AUTHORITIES OF VIETNAM IN LINE WITH THE PROCEDURES 
SET OUT IN ANNEX 11 AND AGREED PROCEDURES OF THE REGION
- THIS NOTAM IS ISSUED IN ACCORDANCE WITH ICAO REQUIREMENTS 
FOR THE SAFETY OF ACFT OP
